Hanan Mansour is a Python Developer with contact information including email (hanan.mansour@email.com) and phone number (+20 101 234 5678), along with links to their GitHub and LinkedIn profiles.
Hanan Mansour received a Bachelor of Engineering (BE) from Cairo University in Cairo, Egypt, from 2017 to 2021.

As a Python Developer at Egy-Tech Solutions in Cairo, Egypt, Hanan Mansour participated in all phases of project development, including design, development, deployment, testing, implementation, and support. They developed both back-end and front-end components using Python and Django, designed and maintained RESTful APIs, and utilized the MVT architecture.

From 2021 to 2022, Hanan Mansour worked on F-MAS (Frequency Monitoring and Analysis System), a system for managing network inventory, communication, fault management, and traffic analysis for telecommunications providers. They developed user interfaces with Python and Django, created and tested RESTful APIs using Postman, and wrote Python routines for web crawling and data fetching.

Hanan Mansour possesses skills in Python, Django, Django REST Framework, SQLAlchemy, Requests, Urllib, MySQL, Oracle, SQLite, MongoDB, HTML, CSS, RESTful APIs, JSON, Git, GitHub, Jira, Postman, Agile, Scrum, Windows, and Unix.

Hanan Mansour is a Cairo-based Python Developer, a meticulous builder of digital systems with a foundation in engineering from Cairo University (2017-2021). Currently at Egy-Tech Solutions, she navigates the full lifecycle of projects – from initial design concepts to deployment and ongoing support – seamlessly blending back-end logic with front-end presentation. Her toolkit centers around Python and the Django framework, and she’s adept at crafting and maintaining robust RESTful APIs using the MVT architectural pattern. 

Hanan isn’t simply a coder; she’s a problem-solver who understands the flow of data. Her work on the F-MAS (Frequency Monitoring and Analysis System) demonstrates this, where she built user interfaces, rigorously tested APIs with Postman, and wrote Python routines for web crawling and data acquisition using libraries like Requests and urllib. She’s comfortable with a range of databases – from SQL variants like MySQL, Oracle, and SQLite to NoSQL options like MongoDB – and possesses a strong understanding of data formats like JSON. 

Beyond the core technologies, Hanan is proficient in tools essential for modern development, including Git for version control, Jira for issue tracking, and GitHub for code deployment. She operates effectively within Agile and Scrum methodologies, and is skilled in both Windows and Unix environments. You can find her work and connect with her via GitHub and LinkedIn. Contact: hanan.mansour@email.com, +20 101 234 5678.
